name: Northern Luri
notes: Northern Luri (لۊری شومالی) — Southwestern Iranian language of Iran (Lorestan and neighbouring provinces). Written in a Perso-Arabic (Arabic-script) alphabet with additional letters for Luri vowels. GRAPHEME INVENTORY NOT YET SPECIFIED: as an abjad, short vowels are normally unwritten, so grapheme→phoneme conversion requires a lexicon or vowel-restoration model rather than a letter table. INPUT CONTRACT: input is expected in the Perso-Arabic Northern Luri orthography.
